excerpt:
CSET Senior Fellow Emelia Probasco shares her experience and the remarks she gave at the Global Nobel Laureates Assembly on Artificial Intelligence and Nuclear War, which took place at Borgo Laudato Si’, Vatican.

The post Remarks at the Global Nobel Laureates Assembly on Artificial Intelligence and Nuclear War in Borgo Laudato Si’, Vatican appeared first on Center for Security and Emerging Technology.
